title: Keplin 2x3m Waterproof Tarpaulin Cover Sheet 90GSM, Heavy Duty, Mould-Resistant, Easy to Wash - PE Material, Reinforced Edges with Metal Eyelets, Green
features: Versatile Protection: Keplin tarpaulins are universal products designed to protect surfaces and objects both indoors and outdoors. Ideal for covering tools and machines, they offer excellent protection against rain, snow, UV radiation, moisture, dirt, and dust. Perfect for covering cars, trailers, boats, shelters, agricultural materials, wood, furniture, and garden pools, suitable for both domestic and professional use.

Reinforced Edges and Metal Eyelets: The tarpaulin edges are reinforced with sturdy bounds and feature metal fixing eyelets every 0.5 meters along the reinforced rubber corners and entire circumference, ensuring easy and secure attachment. Made from durable polyethylene, they are waterproof, mould-resistant, and easy to clean, ensuring long-lasting performance.

Durable and Easy to Maintain: Made from polyethylene (PE), these tarpaulins are waterproof, mould-resistant, and easy to wash. They are perfect for covering cars, trailers, boats, shelters, agricultural materials, wood, furniture, and garden pools, suitable for both domestic and professional use. The polyethylene material ensures that the tarpaulin is extremely durable, retaining its functional properties over time, even in harsh conditions.

Heavy Duty Construction: The polyethylene material ensures that the tarpaulin is extremely durable, retaining its functional properties over time, even in harsh conditions. Built to last, the Keplin Waterproof Tarpaulin Cover Sheet is available in three sizes (300x300cm, 300x400cm, 200x300cm), providing year-round protection for your belongings.

Accurate Sizing: Please note that the tarpaulin size is a "CUT SIZE," and the finished size may vary by +/- 10%. This ensures you get a product that meets your coverage needs effectively. The reinforced edges and metal eyelets make securing the tarpaulin quick and easy, providing robust protection against changing weather conditions and other environmental factors.
description: Product Description Product Specification Material: Durable Polyethylene (PE) Sizes Available: 300x300cm, 300x400cm, 200x300cm Waterproof: Yes Mould-Resistant: Yes Reinforced Edges: Yes Metal Eyelets: Every 0.5 meters Usage: Indoor and outdoor Keplin Waterproof Tarpaulin Covers Durable, Versatile Protection Keplin tarpaulins offer versatile indoor and outdoor protection, shielding surfaces from rain, snow, UV radiation, moisture, dirt, and dust. Ideal for covering cars, trailers, boats, shelters, agricultural materials, wood, furniture, and garden pools, these tarpaulins feature reinforced edges and metal eyelets every 0.5 meters for easy and secure attachment. Made from durable polyethylene, they are waterproof, mould-resistant, and easy to clean.
